---
name: Feature request
about: A new feature within Wake's existing scope
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What you're trying to do that Wake doesn't currently support.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine this working.

## Alternatives

Other ways to solve the problem you considered.

## Out of scope?

Check the project [VISION.md](../docs/VISION.md) and [PRINCIPLES.md](../docs/PRINCIPLES.md). If this falls outside Wake's stated scope (memory, evals, multiagent, etc.), it may be better suited for a separate package.
